description: Compact Glass Widget — native SwiftUI build of the reference VinylPod player chrome (in-art X + window-behavior popover, three-dots settings menu).

Core_Settings_State.notes: Add to AppSettings: musicSource, vinylStyle, showProgress, keepWindowInFront, dynamicNotch, showInMenuBar, launchAtLogin, showArtworkInDock, hideDockIcon, coverArtAsWallpaper, hideNotchInFullscreen. Add VinylStyle enum + reuse DesktopLayer as window stacking.

Glass_Base_Container.notes: Reuse/upgrade GlassPanel: frosted backdrop, inner 3D border stroke (bright top, dark bottom), mauve/dark-slate tint, rounded corners.

Album_Art_With_Inner_X.notes: Album art square; X close button = semi-transparent dark circle INSIDE the art at top-left.

X_Window_Behavior_Menu.notes: Glass popover from X: header 'Window behavior'; 'Above all windows' (check), 'Below all windows'; divider; 'Quit'.

Playback_Controls_UI.notes: prev / play-pause / next; accent-tinted play; optional progress bar (showProgress).

Settings_Dropdown_Menu.notes: Three-dots trigger -> long scrollable glass dropdown with all sections + checkmarks (see design_system.md).

Integration.notes: Compact widget layout wired into ModeContentView (.small/.normal); WindowManager applies stacking in all modes; build + visual verify.
